description: A screenshot continuing a government press release, shown as black text on a white background. It lists bulleted categories of aliens whose Employment Authorization Document validity periods will change from 5 years to 18 months, including aliens admitted as refugees, granted asylum, granted withholding of removal, and several pending-application categories. Further paragraphs reference H.R. 1, the One Big Beautiful Bill Act, Public Law 119-21, signed into law on July 4, 2025, and list additional categories tied to parole and Temporary Protected Status.
notable_text: validity period for initial and renewal EADs will be changed from 5 years back to 18 months; H.R. 1 - One Big Beautiful Bill Act, Public Law 119-21; Temporary Protected Status (TPS)
